---
title: "Richmond to EMB"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="29.66" data-elevation="1573.82">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>29.66</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1573.82 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>22/100</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>26.73</td>
      <td>90.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>1.21</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.86</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>0.66</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.20</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>route_part</th>
      <th>road_name</th>
      <th>distance_mi</th>
      <th>time_low_min</th>
      <th>time_fast_min</th>
      <th>rest_time_after_min</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>3.9</td>
      <td>56.0</td>
      <td>26.0</td>
      <td>140.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Tewksbury Avenue</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>33.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>John T. Knox Freeway</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Unknown Road</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Meadowsweet Drive</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>36.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Bridgeway</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (hard)</td>
      <td>Moore Road</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>17.0</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
      <td>27.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>McDowell Road Southwest</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Van Ness Avenue</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/richmond-marin-conzelman-emb/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>pci_available</th>
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>12.8</td>
      <td>43.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>3.5</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>8.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>2.1</td>
      <td>7.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>6.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>3.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Unclassified (Unknown)</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Service (Unknown)</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Primary (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Motorway (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Tertiary (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Residential (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Unknown</td>
      <td>Secondary (Unknown)</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
